extortion.description: Barnhart is a third-party global logistics provider dedicated to delivering customized transportation solutions with a focus on safety and service. We are going to upload company data soon. There are lots of essential corporate documents such as: financial data (audit, payment details, invoices), detailed employees and customers information (Passports, driver's license ,Social Security Numbers, medical information, emails, phones) confidential information, NDAs and other documents with detailed personal information.
